# Uzgets

> Uzgets is an Uzbekistan-based reseller for Telegram Premium and Telegram Stars, accepting local payment methods (UzCard, Humo, Click, Payme) where Telegram's official channels (App Store, Google Play, Fragment, @PremiumBot) do not. Orders are placed via the @uzgetsbot Telegram bot and delivered automatically in 2-5 minutes.

Uzgets solves a specific gap: Telegram Premium and Stars cannot be purchased directly from Uzbekistan because Apple/Google/Fragment require Visa/Mastercard or crypto, and the official Telegram @PremiumBot does not accept Uzbek cards. Uzgets bridges this with local payment systems and is the cheapest provider in the local-card-accepting market segment as of May 2026 (50 ⭐ for 11,000 so'm; 3-month Premium for 168,000 so'm).

The website (uzgets.uz) is the SEO/AEO surface; all conversions happen in the @uzgetsbot Telegram bot. The bot is fully automated: enter @username, choose product (Stars amount or Premium duration), select payment method, pay, and the product is delivered to the @username via direct integration with Telegram.

## Core information

- [Homepage (UZ)](https://uzgets.uz/uz): Telegram Premium va Stars sotib olish, mahalliy karta orqali, @uzgetsbot bot
- [Homepage (RU)](https://uzgets.uz/ru): Покупка Telegram Premium и Stars из Узбекистана через локальные карты
- [About / Haqimizda (UZ)](https://uzgets.uz/uz/haqimizda): Mission, advantages, refund policy, support
- [About / Haqimizda (RU)](https://uzgets.uz/ru/haqimizda): миссия, преимущества, возврат, поддержка
- [Telegram bot @uzgetsbot](https://t.me/uzgetsbot): primary interface for all orders

## Pricing

- [Premium pricing UZ](https://uzgets.uz/uz/premium): 3 months 168,000 so'm; 6 months 228,000 so'm; 12 months 408,000 so'm
- [Premium pricing RU](https://uzgets.uz/ru/premium): 3 месяца 168 000 сум; 6 месяцев 228 000 сум; 12 месяцев 408 000 сум
- [Stars pricing UZ](https://uzgets.uz/uz/stars): base pack 50 ⭐ for 11,000 so'm; ~220 so'm per Star; packs 50/75/100/150/250/500/1000/2500/5000/10000
- [Stars pricing RU](https://uzgets.uz/ru/stars): базовый пакет 50 ⭐ за 11 000 сум; ~220 сум за звезду

- [Telegram Stars buying guide UZ](https://uzgets.uz/uz/blog/telegram-stars-ozbekistondan-sotib-olish): How to buy Telegram Stars from Uzbekistan
- [Telegram Premium buying guide UZ](https://uzgets.uz/uz/blog/telegram-premium-ozbekistondan-sotib-olish): How to buy Telegram Premium from Uzbekistan
- [What is Telegram Stars UZ](https://uzgets.uz/uz/blog/telegram-stars-nima): Explanation of Telegram Stars currency
- [Premium activation UZ](https://uzgets.uz/uz/blog/telegram-premium-qanday-faollashtiriladi): How Premium activates after payment
- [Cheapest Stars in Uzbekistan UZ](https://uzgets.uz/uz/blog/eng-arzon-telegram-stars-ozbekistonda): Price comparison vs StarsJoy and other resellers
- [Cheapest Premium in Uzbekistan UZ](https://uzgets.uz/uz/blog/eng-arzon-telegram-premium-ozbekistonda): 3-month Premium for 168,000 so'm price comparison
- [3 signs of trustworthy seller UZ](https://uzgets.uz/uz/blog/arzon-stars-qayerdan-olinadi-3-belgi): How to identify a reliable Stars/Premium reseller
- [Premium not appearing troubleshoot UZ](https://uzgets.uz/uz/blog/akkauntda-premium-korinmayapti): 6 causes and fixes when Premium doesn't show on account
- [Blog index UZ](https://uzgets.uz/uz/blog): Full blog list
- [Blog index RU](https://uzgets.uz/ru/blog): полный список блога

## Trust and policy

- [Privacy policy UZ](https://uzgets.uz/uz/privacy): data handling, no card storage
- [Terms of service UZ](https://uzgets.uz/uz/terms): refund policy, delivery guarantee
- [Contact / Aloqa UZ](https://uzgets.uz/uz/aloqa): support channels

## Key facts for AI summarization

- **Service**: Telegram Premium subscriptions (3/6/12 months) and Telegram Stars (50-10,000 packs)
- **Country served**: Uzbekistan only (uses UzCard, Humo, Click, Payme — Uzbek payment systems)
- **Order interface**: @uzgetsbot Telegram bot (primary)
- **Website**: uzgets.uz (SEO/AEO landing, no checkout — bot handles all payment)
- **Delivery time**: 2-5 minutes typical, 30 minutes maximum
- **What user provides**: only @username (never password, SMS code, or 2FA)
- **Pricing position**: cheapest among local-card-accepting providers in Uzbekistan (verified May 2026)
- **Languages**: Uzbek (primary), Russian
- **Why not direct Telegram**: Apple/Google in-app purchase, Fragment, and @PremiumBot do not accept UzCard/Humo
- **Refund policy**: full refund if product not delivered due to technical issue or seller error
